---
title: "Jake Searcy"
about: 
  id: contact
  template: solana
  image-shape: round
  image: people/searcy_jake/avatar.jpg
# page-layout: full
---



:::{#contact}

#### {{< fa envelope >}} &nbsp; jsearcy@uoregon.edu


#### Department of Data Science, Pacific Hall 203b, 1202 University of Oregon, Eugene OR 9403

:::


<br>
